description: Style Note Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ! Product Details Case style:   Stainless steel square case with crystal embellishments for style Dial style: Black dial with metallic hands, crytal embellishments on the dial and branding displayed on the dial Features:  Strap style: Black genuine leather strap with a tang clasp Waterproof to 30 BAR, allowing you to use it even when showering Warranty: 1 year Material and Care Stainless steel Remove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleaner and do not use your fingers on such stains Do not place glasses on uneven surface or heated areas like the dashboard of a car Size Case diameter: 36 mm  Case thickness: 6 mm Style NoteMinimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ!Product DetailsCase style: Stainless steel round case with a fixed bezelDial style: Black dial with white hands and branding displayed on the dialStrap style: Steel strap with a butterfly claspFeatures:  Screw to reset time    Waterproof to 5 BAR, allowing you to use it even when showeringWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 37 mm  Case thickness: 7 mm
